prompt:
Assign GRADE certainty ratings to each evidence item below.
Ratings: HIGH (systematic review of RCTs, low heterogeneity), MODERATE (RCT with some concerns, or consistent observational), LOW (observational studies, high heterogeneity, indirect evidence), VERY_LOW (case reports, expert opinion, serious limitations).

For each item, output ONLY the number and rating, one per line:
1. HIGH
2. MODERATE
...

1. [GOLD] Source: Intermittent fasting improves metabolic outcomes in metaboli | Statement: This Frontiers in Nutrition 2025 systematic review and meta-analysis aimed to evaluate IF effects on glycemic control, lipid profile, and inflammatory
2. [GOLD] Source: Intermittent fasting improves metabolic outcomes in metaboli | Statement: IF significantly reduced fasting blood sugar with SMD = -0.51 (95% CI: -0.81, -0.20; p = 0.001).
